strategy: Attack with Storm or Life, its lowest resists at 40%; never Ice or Myth (100% resist, fully immune).
Do not over-stack blades. It casts a Blizzard that removes three positive charms from your whole team, so Aegis your key blade or set up and hit before the Blizzard strips you.
End it before it snowballs. It casts Power Current on itself every Round, ramping its own damage.
Bring shields for its Ice Blizzard (555 Ice) and burst with a Storm or Life hitter.
As a Raid boss at 14,000 Health, run it as a team: one hitter, supports feeding blades that survive the charm-strip, and a healer.
cheatNotes: At the end of every Round it casts Power Current on itself, ramping its own damage each Round, so kill it before it snowballs.
